title: Semester-End Examination Process for Data Structures
description: A flowchart illustrating the process a student follows when taking their final exam on Data Structures & Applications, focusing on the key decision points and potential outcomes.
elements: Select Data Structure (e.g., Array, Linked List, Tree, Graph, Hash Table)
relationships: Sequential flow from Start to End Exam
Decision loop back from 'Select Data Structure' to 'Analyze Problem' if incorrect choice is considered
'Implement Solution' leads to 'Submit Answer' for grading
